title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at Ecom Express

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at Ecom Express
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Ecom Express. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Logistics Manager to strengthen our Faridabad-based team.

About Ecom Express:
Ecom Express is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in GPS Tracking Systems
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in ERP Systems

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ecom Express!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
